name: Distinct Subsequences Count
description: Count the number of distinct ways a target string t appears as a subsequence of source string s.
intuition: dp[i][j] = ways t[0..j-1] appears in s[0..i-1]. If s[i]==t[j]: dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1] + dp[i-1][j] (include or skip this match). Otherwise dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j].
